case_title: HUI SERENA SUN VS. WILLIAM LEMAR GUNN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-01-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF HUI SERENA SUN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WILLIAM LEMAR GUNN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GUNN, WILLIAM LEMAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SUN, HUI SERENA AS TO DEFENDANT GUNN, WILLIAM LEMAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-26-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUN, HUI SERENA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUNN, WILLIAM LEMAR $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,115.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT GUNN, WILLIAM LEMAR HEARING SET FOR NOV-07-2022 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED MAR-29-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GUNN, WILLIAM LEMAR
